subcodes.first_line: O friends and handmaidens of God! His honor Hormozdyar hath come unto this land and become our companion and friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و کنیزان الهی جناب اورمزدیار باین دیار آمد و همدم و یار گردید و ما
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
